finalized_plan.description: identify all formally confirmed secretaries before April 2019
gather biographical data for each secretary's bachelor's degree university
compare longitudes to identify westernmost and easternmost cities, and
format the answer as a comma-separated list

root_cause_reasoning: The system failed to use the `search_agent` tool to look up the list of secretaries, their universities, city locations, and coordinates, despite identifying these as necessary 'Facts to look up' (Span 4e0d808376c31465) and including information gathering steps in its plan (Span 1307f16657ea7be2). It relied entirely on its internal knowledge.
